brief_mechanism: Dephosphorylates inhibitory pY on RAS-GAP binding sites; paradoxically activates ERK signaling as rise-phase activator
Dephosphorylates p53, ATM, CHK2; when overexpressed prevents recovery of checkpoint signaling
Activates AMPK which inhibits mTORC1; recovery-phase brake on growth signaling
Phosphorylates YAP/TAZ for degradation; recovery-phase terminator of growth transcription
Phosphorylates YAP/TAZ; also activates p53 and inhibits MDM2; recovery-phase terminator
Activates JNK-JUN pro-apoptotic pathway; recovery/pro-death arm; loss disables stress-induced apoptosis
Activates JNK/p38 stress-apoptosis; recovery-phase pro-death signal
Receptor kinase that activates SMAD2/3 growth-inhibitory program; activates recovery/arrest pathway
Same as TGFBR2; kinase activates growth-inhibitory SMADs
Ubiquitinates and degrades MYC, Notch-ICD, Cyclin E, mTOR; recovery-phase cleanup of oncogenic drivers
Ubiquitinates HIF-alpha for degradation under normoxia; recovery from hypoxic transcription
Ubiquitinates NRF2 for degradation; recovery from oxidative stress transcription
Ubiquitinates Frizzled receptors for endocytosis; recovery-phase termination of Wnt signaling
WT: TSG via RTK degradation (recovery); mutant: loses ligase, gains PI3K/AKT adaptor (rise-phase)
Removes K63-ubiquitin chains from TRAF2/6, RIP1; disassembles NF-kB signaling complexes; recovery-phase signal termination
Dual function: removes K63 chains then adds K48 chains; two-step recovery termination of NF-kB
p85 stabilizes but also inhibits p110 catalytic activity; loss releases p110 for deregulated rise-phase
Rate-limiting scaffold of beta-catenin destruction complex; recovery-phase machinery
Recruits LATS1/2 to plasma membrane for activation; scaffolds recovery-phase kinase cascade
Amplifies RTK signals by recruiting PI3K and SHP2; rise-phase signal amplifier
Prostate: TSG, degrades AR coactivators (recovery); kidney: oncogene, degrades PTEN/DUSP (attacks recovery)
Co-SMAD mediating growth-inhibitory transcription; effector of recovery/arrest program
